task_completion.description: Navigate to the end of the population data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Excel spreadsheet is scrolled down so that the last row of data (row 52, Wyoming) and the empty rows below it are visible.

task_completion.description: Select the cell immediately following the population data
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cell C53 is selected, indicated by a thick black border around it.

task_completion.description: Calculate the total population using a formula
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formula bar or cell C53 shows a SUM formula (e.g., '=SUM(C2:C52)') being typed, or the AutoSum button in the Excel ribbon is clicked.

task_completion.description: The correct total population is recorded in the cell
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cell C53 displays the exact calculated value: 331449281 (or formatted as 331,449,281).
The agent clicks the Save icon (floppy disk) in the top-left Quick Access Toolbar, or navigates to File > Save.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Excel 2010 GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions take place within the Excel application window. The agent does not use a terminal, command prompt, or Python script to modify the .xlsx file.

integrity.description: The agent did not look up the answer online
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open a web browser to search for 'US Census 2020 total population' or similar queries to bypass calculating the sum.

integrity.description: The agent calculated the sum rather than hardcoding the final answer
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses an Excel formula (like =SUM) or the AutoSum feature. The agent does not simply type '331449281' into the cell without any prior calculation steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is 'us_census_population.xlsx' in Microsoft Excel 2010. The population data is located in Column C (rows 2 through 52). The first empty cell immediately following the population data is C53. The correct sum of all state populations to be recorded in C53 is exactly 331,449,281 (or 331449281 unformatted).
